title: Stir Fry Eggplant Delight
description: A simple and quick Chinese-inspired stir fry dish made with eggplant, perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat the sesame oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the garlic and ginger and stir-fry for 30 seconds.
Add the eggplant and stir-fry for 3-4 minutes, until tender.
In a small bowl, whisk together the soy sauce and 1 tablespoon of water.
Pour the soy sauce mixture over the eggplant and stir-fry for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Transfer the eggplant to a serving platter and garnish with chopped scallions.
